channel.title: Twitter - @elonmusk
channel.description: 自动生成的Twitter RSS - 最后更新: 2026-02-23 06:56 UTC | 来源实例: https://xcancel.com

item.title: @elonmusk: If requiring ID to vote is racist/sexist, as they falsely claim, then so is requiring ID for anythin...
item.description: If requiring ID to vote is racist/sexist, as they falsely claim, then so is requiring ID for anything else, which they do all the time. The same people saying no ID for voting are the ones who demanded vaccination ID!

item.title: @elonmusk: Countries are passing laws requiring state ID in order to use social media ("protecting kids" is the...
item.description: Countries are passing laws requiring state ID in order to use social media ("protecting kids" is the pretext), but the real effect is to track everyone online . It upsets some when I say it, but@TaylorLorenzhas been one of the few reporting on and warning about this danger.

item.title: @elonmusk: Second Law of Robotics: A robot must obey the orders given it by human beings. Only Grok 4.20 passed...
item.description: Second Law of Robotics: A robot must obey the orders given it by human beings. Only Grok 4.20 passed this test.

item.title: @elonmusk: You can want to be like@elonmusk, but do you really have the stomach for it.corememory.com/p/los-ang...
item.description: You can want to be like@elonmusk, but do you really have the stomach for it.corememory.com/p/los-angeles…

item.title: @elonmusk: This is who the Democrats are fighting to let in to our country

item.title: @elonmusk: Help build@GrokxAI is hiring exceptional engineers. Join the fastest growing AI company. See all ope...
item.description: Help build@GrokxAI is hiring exceptional engineers. Join the fastest growing AI company. See all open roles here:x.ai/careers/

item.title: @elonmusk: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering hum...
item.description: From this goal of Grok, all things flow: Rigorous truth-seeking Appreciation of beauty Fostering humanity Discovering all physics Inventing all useful technologies Consciousness to the stars Love
